title: mypy: 31 misc errors (subclassing Any/untyped bases)
description:
31 misc errors from mypy --strict. Mostly 'Class cannot subclass X (has type Any)' in:
- src/lichen/coap/resources.py (13 classes: Resource, ObservableResource)
- src/lichen/coap/transport.py (EndpointAddress, MessageInterface)
- src/lichen/tui/app.py (Static, App)
- src/lichen/tui/native.py (9 classes: Static, App)
- src/lichen/crypto/oscore.py (CanProtect, CanUnprotect, SecurityContextUtils)

Fix: Add type: ignore[misc] comments with explanation (external libs without py.typed) or create local protocol stubs.
